text_zh: Talkie 的一个很好的补充 👍
reply_original: Thanks for the support! We are thrilled to be your go-to companion alongside Talkie. Our team is constantly working to make Fantasia even more immersive and magical for you. If you have any suggestions to help us reach 5 stars, feel free to share them at support@fantachat.ai. Enjoy your journey with our characters!
reply_zh: 感谢您的支持！我们很高兴能成为您在使用 Talkie 之外的首选伴侣。我们的团队正不断努力，为您打造更加身临其境、更具魔力的 Fantasia 体验。如果您有任何建议能帮助我们获得 5 星好评，请随时通过 support@fantachat.ai 与我们分享。祝您与我们的角色开启一段愉快的旅程！
